consolidate-agent-memories.prompt: IMPORTANT: Before generating any report, read and follow ALL rules in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/report-rules.md. Run memory consolidation. Working directory is Q:/src. Scan all sub-project memory dirs under C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/projects/Q--src*/memory/, compare against root memory at C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/projects/Q--src/memory/, copy new/updated files with ext_ prefix, remove duplicates, update MEMORY.md index (keep under 200 lines), run permission audit, root hygiene, stale file cleanup, and report template audit (scan all agent .md files under C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/agents/ and job configs under Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/jobs/*.json to verify HTML reports have VO subtitle, dark theme, Segoe UI, and are self-contained). If no meaningful work was done (no new memories found, no duplicates removed, no conflicts detected, and no stale files cleaned), do NOT generate an HTML report -- just output 'Memory consolidation: no changes found.' and exit. Only generate a full report when at least one memory was added, updated, deduplicated, or cleaned up. You MUST use the fixed template at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/templates/auditor-memory-consolidation.html. Read the template file, then replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} values with actual data. Replace {{VO_SUBTITLE}} with: Agent: Auditor | Job: consolidate-agent-memories | Start: <PST timestamp when job started> | Complete: <PST timestamp when report is generated>. Save the report to Q:/src/local_skills/session_management/memory-report-YYYYMMDD.html. Open the report in Edge when done.
consolidate-agent-memories.description: Consolidates all sub-project memories into root, deduplicates, generates HTML report

TODO-sprint-progress.prompt: IMPORTANT: Before generating any report, read and follow ALL rules in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/report-rules.md. Generate a sprint progress update now. You MUST use the fixed template at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/templates/scrum-master-sprint-progress.html. Read the template file, then replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} values with actual data from ADO. Replace {{VO_SUBTITLE}} with: Agent: Auditor | Job: TODO-sprint-progress | Start: <PST timestamp when job started> | Complete: <PST timestamp when report is generated>. Save the report to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/sprint-progress-YYYYMMDD.html (using today's date). Also save a copy to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/sprint-progress-latest.html. Open the report in Edge after saving.
TODO-sprint-progress.description: Queries ADO work items and meeting notes to generate sprint progress report

YTD-OOF-Summary.prompt: IMPORTANT: Before generating any report, read and follow ALL rules in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/report-rules.md. Run the YTD-OOF-Summary job. Query both Teams channels (Absence and OOF/WFH/Late) via WorkIQ for all messages from Dec 1 of previous year through today. Filter for direct reports only, classify each absence as full-day OOF or BRB/partial, count only current-year working days. You MUST use the fixed template at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/templates/auditor-ytd-oof-summary.html. Read the template file, then replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} values with actual data. Replace {{VO_SUBTITLE}} with: Agent: Auditor | Job: YTD-OOF-Summary | Start: <PST timestamp when job started> | Complete: <PST timestamp when report is generated>. Open in Edge when done.
YTD-OOF-Summary.description: Monthly YTD OOF summary for direct reports from Teams channels

teams-posting-audit.prompt: IMPORTANT: Read Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/report-rules.md Rule #8 and Rule #9 first. Run a Teams posting permission audit across all VO agent definitions and job configs. Scan: (1) All agent .md files in C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/agents/*.md -- search for keywords: Teams, channel, post, message, Graph API, graph.microsoft.com, chatMessage, @mention, agency copilot, send, notify. (2) All job configs in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/jobs/*.json -- same keywords. (3) All runner scripts in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/ -- same keywords. For EACH match found, classify as: AUTHORIZED (poster agent job with explicit channel ID + fixed template in templates/), READ-ONLY (Graph API GET for data ingestion, not posting), DEPRECATED (has explicit deprecation note), or VIOLATION (unauthorized posting instruction -- any agent other than poster that posts to Teams, any posting without explicit channel ID, any posting without a fixed template). File a GitHub issue in jqxcode/virtual-office for each VIOLATION found, with the file path, line number, exact text, and recommended fix. If no violations found, output 'Teams posting audit: all clear.' and exit. Do NOT generate an HTML report for this job.
teams-posting-audit.description: Weekly audit of all agent defs and job configs for unauthorized Teams posting instructions

consolidate-Edge-reports.prompt: Consolidate Edge browser tabs by running: python Q:/src/personal_projects/edge-tab-exporter/get-tabs.py --consolidate. This moves ungrouped report tabs into their corresponding groups (AAP, BAP, PR, BKiller, Sprint) with correct ordering and exclusions, creates groups if missing, and closes duplicates. Report how many tabs were moved per group and how many duplicates were closed. If nothing was moved and no duplicates found, output 'Edge tab consolidation: no changes.' and exit. Do NOT generate an HTML report for this job.
consolidate-Edge-reports.description: Moves ungrouped Edge report tabs into AAP/BAP/BKiller/PR/Sprint groups and closes duplicates

resolve-bugs-cleanup.prompt: IMPORTANT: Before generating any report, read and follow ALL rules in Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/config/report-rules.md. Run the resolve-bugs-cleanup job in dry-run mode. Query ADO for all Resolved bugs assigned to qitxu@microsoft.com or under Meeting Join (all sub-areas) / Meeting Notes area paths. Validate each bug: resolved for at least 1 day, linked PRs are merged, no comments in last 3 days, not blocked. Close validated bugs automatically (auto-close mode). Use wit_update_work_item to set System.State to Closed and add a comment: Auto-closed by Virtual Office Auditor agent. You MUST use the fixed template at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/templates/auditor-resolve-bugs-cleanup.html. Read the template file, then replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} values with actual data. Replace {{VO_SUBTITLE}} with: Agent: Auditor | Job: resolve-bugs-cleanup | Start: <PST timestamp when job started> | Complete: <PST timestamp when report is generated>. Save report to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/resolve-bugs-cleanup-YYYYMMDD.html. Open in Edge when done.
resolve-bugs-cleanup.description: Auto-close stale Resolved bugs assigned to me or in my area paths
